pageDescription: An honest look at where we lead, where we're catching up, and why it matters.

advantages.title: No Commissions
advantages.desc: Soothe and Zeel take up to 60% of session revenue.

advantages.title: AI Scheduling
advantages.desc: Lead time, travel gaps, and duration-aware slot generation.

advantages.title: Transparent Pricing
advantages.desc: No hidden fees, no upsell tiers.

advantages.title: Mobile-First
advantages.desc: Built for phones, not adapted from desktop.

advantages.title: Multi-Duration
advantages.desc: 60–150 min sessions with real-time availability for each.

roadmap.desc: Pay at booking — no more Venmo after the session
SMS and email confirmations so clients never forget
Health history, conditions, and preferences before arrival
Buy a massage for someone — biggest holiday revenue driver
Clients cancel or reschedule without texting you
Re-engage past clients with automated campaigns

whereWeCatchingUpSubtext: We're a powerful scheduling engine — but scheduling is only one piece. Here's what's on our roadmap.
honestTakeParagraph1: Right now, we're a best-in-class scheduling engine with real AI — not a full business suite. Vagaro at $30/mo gives you payments, reminders, intake forms, gift cards, and marketing. We don't do that yet.
honestTakeParagraph2: What we do is build software specifically for massage therapists, not repurpose salon tools. Our scheduling understands lead time, travel, multi-duration sessions, and timezone-aware availability in ways no competitor matches.
honestTakeParagraph3: The features above marked Soon are actively in development. We'd rather ship each one right than ship everything half-baked.
dataSourceAttribution: Data sourced from platform websites and independent reviews, February 2026.
